title: Skill Evaluation Artifact
description: Harness-neutral evaluation artifact for a skill package. Each harness adapts its native traces into this common envelope.

version.description: Schema version of the evaluation artifact.

skill.description: Skill name or namespaced identifier under test.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test case.

category.description: For trigger tests: whether the prompt should or should not load the skill. For other test types, an arbitrary grouping category.

prompt.description: The user prompt or task input.

expected.description: Expected skill name for trigger tests.

baseline_type.description: Baseline behavior to compare against for behavior tests.

available_skills.description: Skills available to the agent during composition tests.

expected_selection.description: Expected skills selected during composition tests.

assertions.description: Deterministic checks to run against the agent trace or output.

path.description: File or command path for file_read, file_write, or command assertions.

value.description: Expected literal content for output_contains or output_excludes assertions.

pattern.description: Regular expression for regex_match or regex_exclude assertions.
